A Rare Midtown
East Opportunity

CBRE, Inc., as exclusive sublease agent, is pleased to offer this prime fully furnished and wired plug-and-play space on the 26th floor of One Dag Hammarskjöld Plaza.

Positioned at the crossroads of Midtown East with sweeping East River views, this turnkey space is ideal for firms seeking immediate occupancy in a premier Class A tower with best-in-class building amenities.
